title: Un Kannai Partha Piragu Lyrics Yuvan Yuvathi Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Singer: Karthik, Ramya
Song: Un Kannai Partha Piragu 
Lyrics: Priyan 
Music : Vijay Antony
Movie:  Yuvan Yuvathi

Un Kannai Partha Piragu, 
En ulle lacham siragu
Un oara paarvai asaivil manam kudai saayum
Ne vandhu poana piragu, thalaikelaai maarum ulagu
Un illam irukum thisayil thiriyudhu en paadham

Thanneeril aadum aalaiyai, kaatrodu midhakum illayaai
En Manadhum maarukindradhe, unadhaai
Sila neram migavum sugamaai, Sila neram migavum summayaai
Ayyo kadhal paduthu kindrathe, pudhidhaai

Un Kannai Partha Piragu, En ulle lacham siragu
Un oara paarvai asaivil manam kudai saayum

Adi unnai pol pennai engum kandadhillai
Indru varai en manadhai yaarume eerthathillai ..hOh oh... 
Un udhadu endhan perai sollum neram
Silirkiren thavikiren envasam naanum illai ..hOh oh... 
Mazhai nindra podhum kilaigal,siru thooral poduvadhu pol
Ne kadandha piragum ninaivil, irupaai

Un Kannai Partha Piragu, En ulle lacham siragu
Un oara paarvai asaivil manam kudai saayum

Ennai vittu ullam undhan pinnal sellum
Thadukiren thavirkiren idhayamum, ketkavaillai .. ovuhoh..oh
Naan indru pola endrum sokkiponathillai
Idharkumun enakindha paravasam, paindhadhillai .. ovuhoh..oh
Ne netru engu irundhai, en nenjil indru nulaindhal
Ini naalai enna avasthai, purivaai

Un Kannai Partha Piragu, En ulle lacham siragu
Un oara paarvai asaivil manam kudai saayum
Ne vandhu poana piragu, thalaikelaai maarum ulagu
Un illam irukum thisayil thiriyudhu en paadham

Thanneeril aadum aalaiyai, kaatrodu midhakum illayaai
En Manadhum maarukindradhe, unadhaai
Sila neram migavum sugamaai, Sila neram migavum summayaai
Ayyo kadhal paduthu kindrathe, pudhidhaai

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep emotions of love and longing, reflecting the feelings one experiences when separated from a loved one.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie?

In Yuvan Yuvathi, the song plays during a pivotal moment that highlights the romantic connection between the lead characters.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is sung by Karthik and Ramya, both of whom bring a unique charm to the duet.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Un Kannai Partha Piragu was composed by Vijay Antony, known for his catchy and melodious tunes.

When was the song released?

The song was released on July 2, 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Un Kannai Partha Piragu, the heartfelt lyrics convey the emotions of love and longing between two individuals. The song beautifully captures the essence of romance, making it a perfect fit for special occasions like anniversaries and weddings. With Karthik and Ramya's soothing voices, the track evokes nostalgia and warmth, resonating with anyone who has experienced love. The music, composed by Vijay Antony, enhances the emotional depth of the song, making it a memorable piece in the film Yuvan Yuvathi.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Un Kannai Partha Piragu from Yuvan Yuvathi is a melodious duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With Karthik and Ramya's enchanting vocals, this song resonates with anyone who has experienced the magic of romance. The unique collaboration of Priyan's heartfelt lyrics and Vijay Antony's captivating music makes this track a must-listen for all music lovers.
stanzaMeanings: After seeing your eyes, my heart feels light. Your single glance makes my heart flutter. After you came, the world changes, and my feet wander in the direction of your home.
The waves dancing in the water, do they not touch the shore? My heart is also changing because of you. Sometimes it feels very good, sometimes it feels very calm. Oh, love is blooming, it's new.
After seeing your eyes, my heart feels light. Your single glance makes my heart flutter.

I have never seen a girl like you anywhere. Until today, no one has touched my heart. When you call my name, I smile and feel shy. When it rains, it feels like small drops are falling. After crossing, in my thoughts, you remain.
After seeing your eyes, my heart feels light. Your single glance makes my heart flutter. After you came, the world changes, and my feet wander in the direction of your home.
The waves dancing in the water, do they not touch the shore? My heart is also changing because of you. Sometimes it feels very good, sometimes it feels very calm. Oh, love is blooming, it's new.
